_publications._publicationTitle: Merlin deficiency predicts FAK inhibitor sensitivity: a synthetic lethal relationship.

_contextSnippet: Cell growth inhibition analysis demonstrated decreased sensitivity of MM87 MPM cells and MDA-MB-231 breast cancer cells expressing NF2-GFP to VS-4718...The VS-4718 EC 50 in control MM87/GFP cells was ~300 nM, while in MM87/NF2-GFP cells the EC 50 was increased by approximately 3-fold
details: Decreased sensitivity to VS-4718 in MM87 and MDA-MB-231 cells; VS-4718 EC50 increased approximately 3-fold in MM87/NF2-GFP cells vs control
